## Meeting Purpose

[Plan and coordinate the upcoming Strapi & GrowthX AI-powered pSEO webinar.](https://fathom.video/share/g-3C8cdyLjF4yKp7U-AWXeKoQttRRqo6?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Webinar focus: AI-powered workflows for website/content management automation](https://fathom.video/share/g-3C8cdyLjF4yKp7U-AWXeKoQttRRqo6?tab=summary&timestamp=198.0)
  - [Aim for a practical, value-driven approach vs. brand-heavy presentation](https://fathom.video/share/g-3C8cdyLjF4yKp7U-AWXeKoQttRRqo6?tab=summary&timestamp=1151.0)
  - [Luma vs. LiveStorm platform decision pending (trade-off: Marcel's 5k contacts vs. Strapi's existing integrations)](https://fathom.video/share/g-3C8cdyLjF4yKp7U-AWXeKoQttRRqo6?tab=summary&timestamp=1322.0)
  - [Collaborative slide deck and landing page copy to be created, emphasizing hook/angle](https://fathom.video/share/g-3C8cdyLjF4yKp7U-AWXeKoQttRRqo6?tab=summary&timestamp=1575.0)

## Topics

### Webinar Content Direction

  - [Shift from broad AI discussion to practical website/CMS management focus](https://fathom.video/share/g-3C8cdyLjF4yKp7U-AWXeKoQttRRqo6?tab=summary&timestamp=198.0)
  - [Emphasize AI-powered workflows for automating content updates, meta descriptions, etc.](https://fathom.video/share/g-3C8cdyLjF4yKp7U-AWXeKoQttRRqo6?tab=summary&timestamp=208.0)
  - [Potential hook: "AI workflows to put your website on autopilot"](https://fathom.video/share/g-3C8cdyLjF4yKp7U-AWXeKoQttRRqo6?tab=summary&timestamp=1125.0)
  - [Balance between Strapi CMS capabilities and AI-ops workflows](https://fathom.video/share/g-3C8cdyLjF4yKp7U-AWXeKoQttRRqo6?tab=summary&timestamp=198.0)

### Presentation Strategy

  - [Aim for 45-minute content with demo possibility](https://fathom.video/share/g-3C8cdyLjF4yKp7U-AWXeKoQttRRqo6?tab=summary&timestamp=743.0)
  - [Consider breaking content by persona for easier digestion](https://fathom.video/share/g-3C8cdyLjF4yKp7U-AWXeKoQttRRqo6?tab=summary&timestamp=705.0)
  - [Focus on use cases over heavy branding](https://fathom.video/share/g-3C8cdyLjF4yKp7U-AWXeKoQttRRqo6?tab=summary&timestamp=1151.0)
  - [Presenters: Marcel, Paul, and potentially someone from AI-ops](https://fathom.video/share/g-3C8cdyLjF4yKp7U-AWXeKoQttRRqo6?tab=summary&timestamp=41.0)

### Platform Selection

  - [Luma advantages: Easy sign-up, network effects, text reminders](https://fathom.video/share/g-3C8cdyLjF4yKp7U-AWXeKoQttRRqo6?tab=summary&timestamp=1338.0)
  - [LiveStorm advantages: Existing Strapi integrations, reporting capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/g-3C8cdyLjF4yKp7U-AWXeKoQttRRqo6?tab=summary&timestamp=1322.0)
  - [Decision pending based on trade-offs (Marcel's 5k contacts vs. Strapi's tech stack needs)](https://fathom.video/share/g-3C8cdyLjF4yKp7U-AWXeKoQttRRqo6?tab=summary&timestamp=1322.0)

### Collaboration Process

  - [Golzar to create initial slide deck with outline and title ideas](https://fathom.video/share/g-3C8cdyLjF4yKp7U-AWXeKoQttRRqo6?tab=summary&timestamp=1575.0)
  - [Marcel to provide input on slides and assist with landing page copy](https://fathom.video/share/g-3C8cdyLjF4yKp7U-AWXeKoQttRRqo6?tab=summary&timestamp=1703.0)
  - [Team to iterate on shared documents for content refinement](https://fathom.video/share/g-3C8cdyLjF4yKp7U-AWXeKoQttRRqo6?tab=summary&timestamp=1703.0)

### Timeline and Deliverables

  - [Oct 8: Deliver social media package](https://fathom.video/share/g-3C8cdyLjF4yKp7U-AWXeKoQttRRqo6?tab=summary&timestamp=1596.0)
  - [Oct 9: Begin promotion](https://fathom.video/share/g-3C8cdyLjF4yKp7U-AWXeKoQttRRqo6?tab=summary&timestamp=1596.0)
  - [Scheduling a run-through with all presenters (date TBD)](https://fathom.video/share/g-3C8cdyLjF4yKp7U-AWXeKoQttRRqo6?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [Webinar date: October 29th](https://fathom.video/share/g-3C8cdyLjF4yKp7U-AWXeKoQttRRqo6?tab=summary&timestamp=1646.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Paul & Golzar to discuss platform choice with Tory (web ops)](https://fathom.video/share/g-3C8cdyLjF4yKp7U-AWXeKoQttRRqo6?tab=summary&timestamp=1506.0)
  - [Golzar to create and share initial slide deck with outline and landing page copy section](https://fathom.video/share/g-3C8cdyLjF4yKp7U-AWXeKoQttRRqo6?tab=summary&timestamp=1575.0)
  - [Marcel to review slide deck and provide input on direction/headlines](https://fathom.video/share/g-3C8cdyLjF4yKp7U-AWXeKoQttRRqo6?tab=summary&timestamp=1703.0)
  - [Team to collaborate on finalizing webinar title and landing page copy](https://fathom.video/share/g-3C8cdyLjF4yKp7U-AWXeKoQttRRqo6?tab=summary&timestamp=1703.0)
  - [Schedule presenter run-through closer to the event date](https://fathom.video/share/g-3C8cdyLjF4yKp7U-AWXeKoQttRRqo6?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
